name: Simple Field Resolver
query: Add a computed field memberCount to the Group type that returns an integer (hardcode to return 42 for now). The field should use a field resolver. Use the viaduct skill for guidance.
expected_behavior: Adds 'memberCount: Int! @resolver' to the Group type in schema

name: Node Type and Query Resolver
query: Implement the TagNodeResolver and TagQueryResolver for the Tag type. The TagNodeResolver should return a Tag with a hardcoded name and color based on the id. The TagQueryResolver should look up a Tag by its GlobalID. Use the viaduct skill for guidance on using ctx.arguments.id.internalID.
expected_behavior: Uses ctx.arguments.id.internalID to get the UUID

name: Field Resolver with Required Selection Set
query: Add a displayName field to GroupMember that returns a computed display name based on the userId field (e.g. 'User: <userId>'). The field should use a resolver with a required selection set (objectValueFragment) to access userId from the parent. Use the viaduct skill for guidance.
expected_behavior: Creates resolver with @Resolver annotation specifying objectValueFragment

name: Batch Resolution for N+1 Prevention
query: Implement the GroupTagsResolver using batch resolution to prevent N+1 queries. Return a hardcoded list of tags for each group. Use the viaduct skill for guidance on implementing batchResolve with FieldValue.

name: Mutations with GlobalID Handling
query: Implement the mutation resolvers for createTag, updateTag, and deleteTag. The resolvers should use GlobalID properly - using ctx.globalIDFor when returning Tag, and using input.id.internalID for the update/delete mutations. Return hardcoded/mock data. Use the viaduct skill for guidance.
expected_behavior: Uses ctx.globalIDFor when building Tag response

name: Scope-based API Visibility
query: Add admin-only fields to Tag: an internalNotes string field and a usageCount integer field with a resolver. Use 'extend type Tag @scope(to: ["admin"])' to restrict these to admin API consumers. Also add an admin-only deleteAllTags mutation. Implement the UsageCountResolver. Use the viaduct skill for guidance.
expected_behavior: Uses 'extend type Tag @scope(to: ["admin"])' for admin fields
Field resolver for usageCount extends TagResolvers.UsageCount

name: Entity Relationships with Node References
query: Implement the TagCreatedByResolver that resolves the createdBy field using the node reference pattern. It should use ctx.nodeFor() and ctx.globalIDFor() to return a User based on the createdById field. Also implement basic UserNodeResolver and TagNodeResolver. Use the viaduct skill for guidance.
expected_behavior: Creates TagCreatedByResolver with objectValueFragment including createdById
Does NOT fetch user data directly
